golden_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
golden_categories.description: Covers general URL validation with standard protocols and formats.

golden_categories.name: Localhost and Non-TLD URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs without protocols or with localhost and non-TLD domains.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests related to handling protocols, including custom protocols and protocol validation.

golden_categories.name: Underscore Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with underscores in the hostname.

golden_categories.name: TLD and Trailing Dot Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for URLs without TLDs and with trailing dots.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Relative URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling protocol-relative URLs and related options.

golden_categories.name: Fragment and Query Component Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling fragments and query components in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Authentication Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling authentication information in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Host Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating hostnames, including whitelists, blacklists, and regular expressions.

golden_categories.name: Security and Vulnerability Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling security-related cases, such as rejecting invalid protocols and parsing differences.

golden_categories.name: Length Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URL length and configuring maximum allowed length.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests the default behavior of the `isURL` validator without any options.

generated_categories.name: Protocol Requirements
generated_categories.description: Tests related to enforcing or validating protocols in URLs.

generated_categories.name: Host Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests related to host validation, including requirements, whitelists, blacklists, and special host formats.

generated_categories.name: Port Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests ensuring URLs include or validate ports.

generated_categories.name: URL Components Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests related to validating specific URL components such as fragments, queries, and authentication.

generated_categories.name: Length Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests ensuring URLs meet length constraints.

golden_to_generated.reason: The generated category 'Default Validation' aligns with 'Basic URL Validation' as both cover general URL validation with standard protocols and formats.
The generated category 'Protocol Requirements' matches 'Localhost and Non-TLD URLs' as both address protocol requirements and validation for non-standard URLs.

The generated category 'Protocol Requirements' partially overlaps with 'Protocol Handling' as it includes enforcing or validating protocols but does not cover custom protocols or protocol validation comprehensively.
The generated category 'Host Validation' partially overlaps with 'Underscore Handling' as it includes host validation but does not specifically focus on underscores in hostnames.
The generated category 'Host Validation' partially overlaps with 'TLD and Trailing Dot Handling' as it includes host validation but does not specifically address TLDs or trailing dots.
The generated category 'Protocol Requirements' partially overlaps with 'Protocol Relative URLs' as it includes protocol-related validation but does not specifically address protocol-relative URLs.
The generated category 'URL Components Validation' aligns with 'Fragment and Query Component Handling' as both address validation of fragments and query components in URLs.
The generated category 'URL Components Validation' aligns with 'Authentication Handling' as both address validation of authentication information in URLs.
The generated category 'Host Validation' aligns with 'Host Validation' as both address hostname validation, including whitelists and blacklists.

The generated category 'Protocol Requirements' partially overlaps with 'Security and Vulnerability Handling' as it includes protocol validation but does not specifically address security vulnerabilities.
The generated category 'Length Validation' aligns with 'Length Validation' as both address URL length constraints.

generated_to_golden.reason: The generated category 'Default Validation' aligns with 'Basic URL Validation' as both cover general URL validation with standard protocols and formats.

The generated category 'Protocol Requirements' spans multiple golden categories as it addresses protocol validation, including enforcing protocols, handling custom protocols, and security-related cases.
The generated category 'Host Validation' spans multiple golden categories as it includes host validation, handling underscores, and TLD-related cases.
The generated category 'Port Validation' partially overlaps with 'Basic URL Validation' as it includes port validation, which is a subset of general URL validation.
The generated category 'URL Components Validation' aligns with 'Fragment and Query Component Handling' and 'Authentication Handling' as it addresses validation of these specific URL components.
The generated category 'Length Validation' aligns with 'Length Validation' as both address URL length constraints.
